data.name: BYOVD-CRITICAL: EDR Killer Driver Load
data.description: CRITICAL: Detects loading of 34 drivers actively used by ransomware operators and APTs to kill EDR/AV processes (BYOVD - Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver). Includes RTCore64 (RansomHub, BlackByte), ProcExp152 (AuKill/Medusa), Truesight (Poortry), Zamguard (BlackByte), Avast anti-rootkit (AvosLocker, Cuba), and others. Any match on a production endpoint is a strong indicator of active compromise.
data.contents: process.path ends with '\\asio64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\aswarpot.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\aswarpotsys' OR process.path ends with '\\aswvmm.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\cpuz141.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\daxin_blank5.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\dbutil_2_3.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\elrawdsk.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\ene.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\gdrv.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\gmer64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\inpoutx64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\iqvw64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\iqvw64e.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\kprocesshacker.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\ktgn.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\mhyprot2.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\mhyprot3.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\ntbios.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\pchunter.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\procexp152.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\rawdisk.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\reddriver.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\rentdrv2.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\rtcore32.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\rtcore64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\speedfan.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\truesight.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\viragt64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winio32.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winio64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wintapix.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\zam64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\zamguard64.sys'

data.description: Detects loading of known-vulnerable drivers from loldrivers.io (batch 9 of 9, covering 18 drivers: winio64b.sys through zamguard64.sys). These drivers have known vulnerabilities that allow kernel-level read/write, process termination, or arbitrary code execution. Source: LOLDrivers.io + SigmaHQ + magicsword-io.
data.contents: process.path ends with '\\winio64b.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winio64c.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winiodrv.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winring0.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\winring0x64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wintapix.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wirwadrv.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wiseunlo.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wnbios.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wsdkd.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wsftprm.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wyproxy32.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\wyproxy64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\xjokercontroller.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\yyprotect64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\zam64.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\zamguard32.sys' OR process.path ends with '\\zamguard64.sys'

techniques.name: Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify Tools

labels.name: BYOVD
labels.description: Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver detections
